name: G3SG1 | 黑砂
descriptionEn: The pricy G3SG1 lowers movement speed considerably but compensates with a higher rate of fire than other sniper rifles. It has been custom painted with a tan and black military camo pattern. The Coalition Taskforce was winning, so Mikah turned to a more... aggressive approach
descriptionZh: 昂贵的 G3SG1 极大地减慢了移动速度，但有着比其它狙击步枪都高的射速作为补偿。 枪身涂有棕色和黑色相间的军事迷彩图案。 联合特遣部队就快要赢了，Mikah得采取激进战略
